items.name: SC-4K - GOAT (2026)
items.description: A small goat with big dreams gets a once-in-a-lifetime shot to join the pros and play roarball, a high-intensity, co-ed, full-contact sport dominated by the fastest, fiercest animals in the world.
items.actors: Caleb McLaughlin, Gabrielle Union, Stephen Curry, Aaron Pierre, Nicola Coughlan

items.name: 4K-SC - Moana 2 (2024)
items.description: After receiving an unexpected call from her wayfinding ancestors, Moana journeys alongside Maui and a new crew to the far seas of Oceania and into dangerous, long-lost waters for an adventure unlike anything she's ever faced.
items.director: David G. Derrick Jr., Jason Hand, Dana Ledoux Miller
items.actors: Auliʻi Cravalho, Dwayne Johnson, Hualālai Chung, Rose Matafeo, David Fane

items.name: 4K-SC - Kung Fu Panda 4 (2024)
items.description: Po is gearing up to become the spiritual leader of his Valley of Peace, but also needs someone to take his place as Dragon Warrior. As such, he will train a new kung fu practitioner for the spot and will encounter a villain called the Chameleon who conjures villains from the past.
items.actors: Jack Black, Awkwafina, Viola Davis, Dustin Hoffman, Bryan Cranston

items.name: 4K-SC - Lilo & Stitch (2025)
items.description: The wildly funny and touching story of a lonely Hawaiian girl and the fugitive alien who helps to mend her broken family.
items.director: Dean Fleischer Camp, Brian Avery Galligan, Stephanie Tull, Richard Oswald, Aldric La'Auli Porter
items.actors: Maia Kealoha, Sydney Agudong, Chris Sanders, Zach Galifianakis, Billy Magnussen

items.name: SC - Kingsglaive: Final Fantasy XV  (2016)
items.description: The magical kingdom of Lucis is home to the world’s last remaining Crystal, and the menacing empire of Niflheim is determined to steal it. King Regis of Lucis commands an elite force of soldiers called the Kingsglaive. Wielding their king’s magic, they fight to protect Lucis. As the overwhelming military might of the empire bears down, King Regis is faced with an impossible ultimatum – to marry his son, Prince Noctis to Princess Lunafreya of Tenebrae, captive of Niflheim, and surrender his lands to Niflheim rule.  Although the king concedes, it becomes clear that the empire will stop at nothing to achieve their devious goals, with only the Kingsglaive standing between them and world domination.
items.director: Square Visual Works Co. Ltd., Digic Pictures, Pixoloid Studios, Square Enix, Square USA, The Monk Studios, Toneplus Animation Studios
items.actors: N/A

items.name: SC - Luca  (2021)
items.description: Luca and his best friend Alberto experience an unforgettable summer on the Italian Riviera. But all the fun is threatened by a deeply-held secret: they are sea monsters from another world just below the water’s surface.
items.actors: N/A

items.name: SC - Soul  (2020)
items.description: Joe Gardner is a middle school teacher with a love for jazz music. After a successful gig at the Half Note Club, he suddenly gets into an accident that separates his soul from his body and is transported to the You Seminar, a center in which souls develop and gain passions before being transported to a newborn child. Joe must enlist help from the other souls-in-training, like 22, a soul who has spent eons in the You Seminar, in order to get back to Earth.
items.actors: N/A

items.name: SC - The Croods: A New Age  (2020)
items.description: Searching for a safer habitat, the prehistoric Crood family discovers an idyllic, walled-in paradise that meets all of its needs. Unfortunately, they must also learn to live with the Bettermans -- a family that's a couple of steps above the Croods on the evolutionary ladder. As tensions between the new neighbors start to rise, a new threat soon propels both clans on an epic adventure that forces them to embrace their differences, draw strength from one another, and survive together.
items.actors: N/A

items.name: SC - The One and Only Ivan  (2020)
items.description: A gorilla named Ivan who’s living in a suburban shopping mall tries to piece together his past, with the help of other animals, as they hatch a plan to escape from captivity.
items.director: Allison Shearmur Productions, Digital Makeup Group, Jolie Pas Productions, Walt Disney Pictures
items.actors: N/A

items.name: SC - Lamp Life (2020)
items.description: Bo Peep makes a big comeback in Disney and Pixar’s Toy Story 4 and she leads the way in the all-new animated short film, finally answering the questions about where Bo was since we last we saw her in Toy Story 2.
items.actors: N/A

items.name: SC - Peter Pan (1953)
items.description: Leaving the safety of their nursery behind, Wendy, Michael and John follow Peter Pan to a magical world where childhood lasts forever. But while in Neverland, the kids must face Captain Hook and foil his attempts to get rid of Peter for good.
items.director: RKO Radio Pictures, Walt Disney Pictures, Walt Disney Productions
items.actors: N/A

items.name: SC - The Black Cauldron (1985)
items.description: Taran is an assistant pigkeeper with boyish dreams of becoming a great warrior. However, he has to put the daydreaming aside when his charge, an oracular pig named Hen Wen, is kidnapped by an evil lord known as the Horned King. The villain hopes Hen will show him the way to The Black Cauldron, which has the power to create a giant army of unstoppable soldiers.
items.director: Silver Screen Partners II, Walt Disney Pictures
items.actors: N/A

items.name: SC - The Princess Bride (1987)
items.description: In this enchantingly cracked fairy tale, the beautiful Princess Buttercup and the dashing Westley must overcome staggering odds to find happiness amid six-fingered swordsmen, murderous princes, Sicilians and rodents of unusual size. But even death can't stop these true lovebirds from triumphing.
items.director: The Princess Bride Ltd., Buttercup Films Ltd., Act III Productions
items.actors: N/A

items.name: SC - Trolls World Tour (2020)
items.description: Queen Poppy and Branch make a surprising discovery — there are other Troll worlds beyond their own, and their distinct differences create big clashes between these various tribes. When a mysterious threat puts all of the Trolls across the land in danger, Poppy, Branch, and their band of friends must embark on an epic quest to create harmony among the feuding Trolls to unite them against certain doom.
items.actors: N/A

items.name: SC - Frozen II (2019)
items.description: Elsa, Anna, Kristoff and Olaf head far into the forest to learn the truth about an ancient mystery of their kingdom.
items.director: Walt Disney Animation Studios, Walt Disney Pictures
items.actors: N/A

items.name: SC - Shrek the Third (2007)
items.description: The King of Far Far Away has died and Shrek and Fiona are to become King & Queen. However, Shrek wants to return to his cozy swamp and live in peace and quiet, so when he finds out there is another heir to the throne, they set off to bring him back to rule the kingdom.
items.actors: N/A

items.name: SC - Here We Are: Notes for Living on Planet Earth (2020)
items.description: On the eve of Earth Day, a precocious seven-year-old learns about the wonders of the planet from his parents—and a mysterious exhibit at the aptly named Museum of Everything. Based on the best-selling children's book by Oliver Jeffers.
items.actors: N/A

items.name: DK - Week-end (1935)
items.description: Lystspil med Lau Lauritzen som sports-roer, der har ganske mange problemer med sin båd - firer med styrmand. I forholdet til sin kæreste Eva går det heller ikke meget bedre. Det er som en toer uden styrmand og ude af kurs. Helt galt går det, da hans enfoldige fætter, spillet af In Schønberg, ankommer fra Fyn for at holde week-end med dem. Der er løsninger på alt, til lands og til vands, men der fanges mange ugler, før det overordnede samarbejde kommer til at fungere. Lau Lauritzen og Alice O'Fredericks sidder ved instruktions-roret, og det er heldigvis på ret og underholdende kurs.
items.actors: Asbjørn Andersen, Svend Bille, Ego Brønnum-Jacobsen, Gerd Gjedved, Per Gundmann, Betty Helsengreen, Jon Iversen, Ellen Jansø, Arthur Jensen, Sigfred Johansen

items.name: DK - Peter Andersen (1941)
items.description: Peter Andersen er agent. Hverken grosserer eller repræsentant, men slet og ret agent. Han har i modsætning til sin kone ingen honnette ambitioner. Han er et ærligt, fredsommeligt og ejegodt menneske, der hele sit liv har slæbt som en trækokse, pisket frem af en chef, der bestandig kræver resultater, og af en familie, der stadig forlanger penge til fornøjelser.
items.actors: Carl Alstrup, Erika Voigt, Inger Lassen, Poul Reichhardt, Asta Hansen, Gudrun Bruun Stephensen, Edgar Hansen, Victor Montell, Ingrid Matthiessen, Marie Niedermann

items.name: DK - Ud i den kolde sne (1934)
items.description: Taxachauffør Peter Basse er en jovial og gemytlig mand, der trofast passer sin dont ved rattet og med uforstyrrelig sindsro styrer sin vogn gennem Københavns gader. En dag kører han for den stilfulde herskabstjener Johan, ansat hos den gamle enkebaronesse von Hessen. Taxachaufføren får til opgave at bringe et vigtigt brev til enkebaronessens sønnesøn. Undervejs erfarer Peter Basse, at enkebaronessen måske er ved at blive skør. Hun har i hvert fald stiftet bekendtskab med to spiritister.
items.actors: Mathilde Nielsen, Hans W. Petersen, Ib Schønberg, Sigurd Langberg, Aase Clausen, Ellen Jansø, Arthur Jensen, Arne-Ole David, Henry Nielsen, Christian Schrøder

items.name: DK - Final Hour (1995)
items.description: Some students gets locked up in their school and is stalked by a killer. But as time goes by, it turns out that there is more to this than it seems.
items.actors: Peter Jorde, Lene Laub Oksen, Rikke Louise Andersson, Tomas Villum Jensen, Ken Vedsegaard

items.name: DK - Bananen - Skræl den før din nabo! (1990)
items.description: Detective Mortensen is certainly not the sharpest tool in the shed, but despite his obvious incompetence, he is assigned to track down a group of drug gangsters. Nothing good comes of it. Only coincidences and extreme luck keep the investigation on track, even though Mortensen's highly questionable methods constantly threaten to ruin everything.
items.actors: Dick Kaysø, Ole Ernst, Brian Patterson, Claus Bue, Thomas Eje, Helle Michaelsen, Jan Monrad, Søren Rislund, Torben Zeller, Jens Korse

items.name: DK - Backstabbed (1996)
items.description: Four high school friends meet up in an abandoned house to play 'Backstabbed', a game of murder with headphones and plastic weapons. Meanwhile, a serial killer is leaving a trail of blood on his way to the house, and soon the game of murder becomes much more than make-believe.
items.actors: Line Kruse, Christian Grønvall, Mari-Anne Jespersen, Karl Bille, Laura Drasbæk

items.name: DK - Two Penny Dance (1999)
items.description: The story of Juliane, a young woman who learns how to take her fate in her own hands and to trust nobody but herself. The plot is set in the Copenhagen tenements of the 1880s. Juliane is trapped in an unhappy marriage to a man who suffers extended periods of insanity. They have two children. She struggles to improve her social status, however, striving to attain the level of her two elder sisters is not easy. The great upheaval comes when she meets Otto, a smith, younger than Juliane, and in many ways her opposite. He is an ardent socialist, whereas she believes in herself. It is love at first sight when they meet and waltz on the pavement, but their passion really bursts into flame as time goes by. At last Juliane has found a man as strong-willed as she is.
items.director: Hans Kristensen, Joakim Höglund, Karin Trolle, Lillian Rype Fokdal
items.actors: Mette Lisby, Pelle Koppel, Lars Simonsen, Bodil Jørgensen, Kristian Halken

items.name: DK - Juliane (2000)
items.description: Christianshavn 1894 - Headstrong Juliane fights alongside her husband Otto for love and family in strike-ridden Christianshavn. The couple has been married for five years and has two children together. Trade union politics are taking up more and more of Otto's life, and Juliane cannot even get him to tone it down at family gatherings, so Juliane has her hands full keeping track of the home and the children. The family argues about big and small things, from the sisters' disagreement about women's liberation to Otto's political involvement.
items.director: Hans Kristensen, Joakim Höglund, Karin Trolle, Lillian Rype Fokdal
items.actors: Mette Lisby, Pelle Koppel, Bodil Jørgensen, Kristian Halken, Sanne Grangaard

items.name: DK - Life with Daddy (1967)
items.description: Herbert and Bitten live in a lovely house, happily married with two children. Herbert is a teacher at a secondary school, and he writes poetry in his spare time. Bitten is an engineer at a tie factory. Their home only functions thanks to their housekeeper, Mrs. Jørgensen. When Mrs. Jørgensen is confronted with her greatest fear—a live mouse—she leaves the home, never to return. Now there is only one thing to do: Herbert must give up his job and become a stay-at-home dad.
items.actors: Morten Grunwald, Ghita Nørby, Marguerite Viby, Bodil Udsen, Jesper Langberg

items.name: DK - Blaavand melder storm (1938)
items.description: Svend come back after a year of travel as a mate. Inger and Svend's father has been waiting him with longing. Conversely, Svends brother Thorsten, jealousy at Svend. Both of Inger's love for Sven and because Svend take over the family fishing boat. After a new argument in the family takes Svend space with another skipper, so that Thorsten can get the boat. Thorsten sabotage the radio, so that Sven and Inger can not talk. So reports Bluewater storm!
items.actors: Osvald Helmuth, Frits Helmuth, Betty Söderberg, Lise Thomsen, Axel Frische

items.name: DK - Release All the Horses (2000)
items.description: Window cleaner Bent A. Pedersen, with his indomitable spirit, lives with his friend Sigfred because he can't stand his neurotic wife and disabled son. When a boy accidentally smashes the side mirror of his new car, Bent follows him to get his father to pay for the damage. A pretty but fragile single mother, whom Bent thinks resembles Ingrid Bergman, opens the door, and life in Amager is never the same again.
items.actors: Erik Clausen, Marianne Frost, Ricky Vends, Tomáš Novotný, Britta Lillesøe

items.name: DK - Panserbasse (1936)
items.description: An American gangster nicknamed "English Joe" has fled across the Mexican border with his gang, consisting of four men in addition to himself. The American police are after them because of a bank robbery in which they killed several of the bank's employees. But "English Joe" soon comes up with a new plan that can bring them to safety for a while and at the same time give them the opportunity for a new coup. An old engineer who has worked at a weapons factory in Mexico has traveled home to his own country to complete an epoch-making invention: the silent machine gun. The men are ordered to Denmark, where the old engineer now lives.
items.actors: Ib Schønberg, Arthur Jensen, Lis Smed, Lau Lauritzen Jr., Poul Reichhardt

items.name: DK - Fish Out of Water (1993)
items.description: The early 1990s: 300,000 Danes are out of work. Viggo, a machinist with two grown children, is silent about feelings, scared he'll lose his job, loud about the value of trade unionism, interested in his pet fish, and argumentative at dinner. His wife Oda puts up with his moods and works on family genealogy. When Viggo is laid off, he becomes a fish out of water, hardly looking for work, starting a garden, and taking up with Karen, a polished but unhappy widow. He lies to his wife about a union training and goes to Mallorca with Karen. When she stops the affair, Viggo ends up in a psychiatric ward and must figure out what's really important in his life and in his character
items.actors: Erik Clausen, Helle Ryslinge, Leif Sylvester, Anne Marie Helger, Bjarne Liller

items.name: DK - Twist and Shout (1984)
items.description: Danish teens come of age in 1963. Bjorn and Erik are close friends. Bjorn is pursued by Kirsten, a future Stepford wife, but he falls for Anna, who initiates him into love and sex. Erik is somber, caring for his home-bound mentally-ill mother while his strict father rules his life. He desires Kirsten, but she's unattainable. Pregnancy, a horrific abortion, an engagement party, and a revelation about the rectitude of Erik's father lead to a climax: Bjorn and Erik must stand up to controlling adults.
items.actors: Adam Tønsberg, Lars Simonsen, Camilla Søeberg, Ulrikke Bondo, Lone Lindorff

items.name: DK - Suzanne og Leonard (1984)
items.description: In this suspenseful chase movie, a couple try to outrun both the police and the gangsters who are after them for a murder they did not commit. Suzanne dreads yet another dull weekend in the country with her rich parents but is unprepared for what lies just ahead. Leonard, an escaped convict, is in desperate need of food and a car, and Suzanne happens to be in the wrong place at the wrong time -- she ends up providing him with both and is taken with him as he makes his motorized getaway.
items.actors: Pernille Falck, Ole Meyer, Preben Neergaard, Fritze Hedemann, Tammi Øst

items.name: DK - Lyntoget (1951)
items.description: A dangerous prison escaper, a young Jutland woman, and a bank clerk, who has just deprived his employer of some cash and is now headed abroad, meet on a lyntog (literally "lightning train") from Arhus to Copenhagen.
items.actors: Preben Lerdorff Rye, Anne-Marie Juhl, Ib Schønberg, Asbjørn Andersen, Erik Mørk

items.name: DK - Hold fingrene fra mor (1951)
items.description: H.F.F.M. - "Hands off Mom" - is the name of an association founded by four siblings to keep their mother all to themselves. Now they don't want any more strangers in their private paradise. The small family lives in a cozy attic apartment in Copenhagen. The mother is a writer, and since she is divorced, she has to manage on her own.
items.actors: Berthe Qvistgaard, Lone Hertz, Gunnar Lauring, Helge Kjærulff-Schmidt, Preben Mahrt

items.name: DK - Næsbygaards arving (1965)
items.description: Godsejer Martin Kaas bor sammen med sit barnebarn Martin på Næsbygård. Martin er en ivrig rytter. En dag taber hans hest en sko, Martin søger ned til landsbyens smed Mortensen, og træffer her smedens plejedatter Elise. Smeden har ord for at være en hæderlig og religiøs mand, men ingen andre end Elise ved hvor brutal og ondskabsfuld han i virkeligheden er. Elise opdager, at hendes sted fader sammen med godsets forvalter Hermansen foretager mange lyssky forretninger, der ikke er til fordel for godset. Martin der ofte føler sig alene, knytter et varmt venskab med Elise. Martin forsvinder en dag, og et efterladt brev på sengen, afslører at han er blevet bortført, og kun en stor løsesum kan bringe drengen tilbage.
items.actors: Asbjørn Andersen, Ole Neumann, Poul Reichhardt, Jane Thomsen, Inger Stender, Karen Berg, Agnes Rehni, Ib Mossin, Henry Lohmann, Sonja Oppenhagen

items.name: DK - Me and My Kid Brother and the Smugglers (1968)
items.description: It's not just eels and rubber boots that Søren and Peter catch when they fish in waters teeming with smugglers... The parish council is against serving alcohol at the inn, but luckily for them, brothers Søren and Peter often catch both whisky and cigarettes when they go fishing. The naive brothers believe that their catch is lost property. The parish council chairman, on the other hand, is so tired of the two constantly knocking on doors that he asks them to give away their catch. And then things might start to happen. Not least at the nursing home. But one day, it all comes to an end. The police and customs authorities invade the idyllic Bomø, and all hell breaks loose for the two unfortunate fishermen...
items.actors: Dirch Passer, Poul Reichhardt, Karl Stegger, Jesper Langberg, Peter Reichhardt

items.name: DK - Me and My Kid Brother and Doggie (1969)
items.description: The third film about the two good-natured brothers Søren and Peter and their family on the small island of Bomø. This time, the brothers have acquired a soccer-loving dog named Bølle, who turns out to be able to predict the results of betting pools. This causes chaos in the betting service, on Bomø, and at Christiansborg.
items.actors: Dirch Passer, Poul Reichhardt, Karl Stegger, Jesper Langberg, Preben Mahrt

items.name: DK - Me and My Kid Brother (1967)
items.description: The entire population of Bomø has gathered for the big day. Finally, after 56 years, the bridge connecting Bomø to the mainland has been completed. With the parish council chairman at the helm and the minister cutting the ribbon to make it official, everything should be in perfect order. However, the county governor is absent, as he has a financial dispute with the ferrymen, brothers Søren and Peter Severinsen.
items.actors: Dirch Passer, Poul Reichhardt, Lily Broberg, Jesper Langberg, Gunnar Lauring

items.name: DK - Krybskytterne paa Næsbygaard (1966)
items.description: At the Næsbygaard estate, the old landowner misses his grandson Martin, who is on a cattle farm in Texas learning about agriculture. The estate's shooter is ill, so the stud master has to take care of his job as well. This comes at a time when he is training hard for the gallop race for the King's honorary prize. To help lift their spirits, they are visited by some children from Copenhagen who are on vacation. When serious problems arise involving poaching on the estate's land, the children help to solve the case. The stud farm manager is injured, and it looks as if the estate's horse will not be able to participate in the big gallop race. But luckily, young Martin returns home from Texas just in time....
items.actors: Asbjørn Andersen, Holger Juul Hansen, Inger Stender, Jane Thomsen, Karen Berg

items.name: DK - Kampen om Næsbygaard (1964)
items.description: The only daughter of an old landowner has died in Italy after leaving her family 15 years ago. Her son now returns home to Denmark. He threatens the landowner's nephew for his inheritance, prompting the nephew to devise several plans to discredit the boy in the eyes of his grandfather. The plans almost succeed, but thanks to help from the priest, among others, the story ends with a reconciliation between the grandson and his grandfather.
items.actors: Poul Reichhardt, Ole Neumann, Ib Mossin, Peter Malberg, Christian Arhoff

items.name: DK - Vil du se min smukke navle? (1978)
items.description: Den generte 15-årige Claus går i 8. klasse, der skal på lejrskole i Sverige. Med på turen er klassekammeraten Lene, der i er mere modig og udadvendt end Claus. På turen får Claus mulighed for at lære Lene bedre at kende og får for første smagt på, hvad voksenlivet kan byde på.
items.actors: Jesper Christensen, Birger Larsen, Lise-Lotte Rao, Henning Palner, Helle Borup, Maria Keller, Lars Jesper Nielsen, Lise-Lotte Henriksen, Erik Winther, Karina Jarlstrup

items.name: DK - Langturschauffør (1981)
items.description: Socialrealistisk film om en gruppe langturschauffører og deres vanskeligheder med at bevare et familieliv, når de er væk det meste af tiden. Tilmed bliver de ofre for et forsikringssvindelnummer, udtænkt af deres arbejdsgivere og den sydeuropæiske mafia.
items.actors: Otto Brandenburg, Kirsten Olesen, Jens Okking, Ejner Federspiel, Jørn Faurschou, Pia Engels, Kirsten Jensen, Beatrice Palner, Claus Strandberg, Solbjørg Højfeldt

items.name: DK - Den røde tråd (1989)
items.description: A movie with the popular band Shu-bi-dua. With bad guys, proud heroes, ladies in trouble and last but not least .... bus chases... without a ticket!
items.actors: Thomas Eje, Michael Bundesen, Michael Hardinger, Kim Daugaard, Claus Asmussen

items.name: DK - Body Switch (1995)
items.description: A dying elderly scientist proposes love-sick Jonas a cure that will improve the youngster's physical skills and general sex-appeal. What the scientist really aims to accomplish is a body switch: he wants to survive in a young man's body and gladly leaves Jonas to wake up in his own wasted frame. Jonas must somehow signal his predicament to his friends. Both men rev up for a survival-of-the-fittest chase.
items.actors: Ulf Pilgaard, Morten Schaffalitzky, Kenn Godske, Helle Fagralid, Jannie Faurschou

items.name: DK - The Hideaway (1991)
items.description: Han hedder egentlig Martin, men alle kalder ham Møv. Hidtil er de største eventyr, han har oplevet, blevet sendt kl 16 om søndagen. Men det bliver der rettet op på nu. Nede i hans kælder ligger Funder. Funder er ikke bare 10 år ældre end Møv, han er også såret af et knivstik og på flugt fra politiet. Og den eneste der kan hjælpe ham er Møv.
items.actors: Kasper Tuxen, Allan Winther, Niels Skousen, Kristine Horn, Steen Svare, Ditte Gråbøl, Kim Jansson, Nikolaj Thide, Morten Søborg, Jonas Gülstorff

items.name: DK - Flemming på kostskole (1961)
items.description: Flemming (Steen Flensmark)skændes meget med sine forældre. Så de bliver enige om at det er bedst at Flemming kommer på Kostskole. Her møder han en helt anden verden, og skal nu prøve at klare sig i drenge miljøet. Der finder han ud af hvor godt det er at man har en familie, og at det ikke var den bedste løsning på skænderierne.
items.actors: Gunnar Lauring, Asbjørn Andersen, Ghita Nørby, Louis Miehe-Renard, Astrid Villaume, Jan Priiskorn Schmidt, Elith Foss, Pouel Kern, Bodil Udsen, Søren Elung Jensen

items.name: DK - Flemming and Kvik (1960)
items.description: Flemming og Kvik følges gennem deres skolegang, hvor de udsættes for alle de sædvanlige problemer og bliver sendt bort og vender tilbage med sejrens palmer. De er storartede drenge, frække, men med hjerter af guld.
items.actors: Johannes Meyer, Jørgen Reenberg, Bjarne Forchhammer, Gunnar Lauring, Astrid Villaume, Jan Priiskorn Schmidt, Elisabeth Rygaard, Berthe Qvistgaard, Ghita Nørby, Louis Miehe-Renard

items.name: DK - The Circus Casablanca (1981)
items.description: Sommeren er på vej og Charles og Sylvester mødes for igen at køre ud på landevejene og gøgle ved forskellige byfester. På vejen slår de følgeskab med en ung kvinde Laila, der er stukket af fra et behandlingshjem. Livet som gøgler er ikke så nemt og ligetil. Det er svært at finde passende publikum. Politiet sender dem også flere gange videre mod næste by. Charles ønsker at Sylvester skal være kanonkonge og Charles forsøger at skaffe penge til kanonen. Sylvester er ikke begejstret for ideen. Da Casablanca en nat er i en lille provinsby finder Charles sammen med en gift kone. Hendes mand opdager affæren og brænder Cirkus Casablanca af. Charles forsætter sammen med sin søn, men Sylvester og Laila får ansættelse i et tivoli.
items.actors: Erik Clausen, Leif Sylvester, Helle Fastrup, Dagmar Andreasen, Niels Skousen, Kristian Halken, Ole Meyer, Eva Krogh, Ulla Koppel, Holger Vistisen

items.name: DK - Fruen på Hamre (2000)
items.description: For at bevare slægtsgården Hamre følger Bente sin døende fars vilje og gifter sig med den brutale godsejersøn Gorm. Han jagter gårdens unge piger og ligger under for den onde og intrigante skytte Groves dårlige indflydelse. Det ulykkelige ægteskab bliver til en veritabel magtkamp mellem Bente og Gorm. Parallelt følges Bentes yngre søster Grethe, der tilsyneladende bliver lykkeligt gift med købmandssønnen Martin. Denne er imidlertid unaturligt stærkt knyttet til sin mor, og hans familie bruger løs af Grethes arv.
items.actors: Bodil Jørgensen, Bjarne Henriksen, Rikke Louise Andersson, Nicolaj Kopernikus, Tommy Kenter, Regitze Estrup, Holger Perfort, Solbjørg Højfeldt, Finn Nielsen, Erik Wedersøe

items.name: DK - Pyrus På Pletten (2000)
items.description: Ved en tilfældighed har Pyrus fundet frem til Gyldengrøds gamle laboratorium, der har stået aflåst i mange år. Da Rigsarkivarens svigersøn Krusø pådrager sig en voldsom vinterforkølelse, er Pyrus optændt af ønsket om at hjælpe og forsøger at kurere Krusø ved hjælpe af eliksir fra Gyldengrøds laboratorium. Virkningen er katastrofal. Krusø skrumper ind til nissestørrelse og tumler forvirret rundt i arkivet. Krusø kommer i besiddelse af nissernes tryllebog, som gør ham i stand til at trylle sig ind i forskellige bøger. Og ulykkerne vælter ned over landets statsminister, da Krusø turnerer rundt i telefonbøger, oversigten over trafikplanlægningen i København samt værst af alt i selveste finansloven. Pyrus er ulykkelig. For en gangs skyld forsøgte han at gøre det rigtige og nu er alle bare endnu mere sure på ham end før. Hvordan skal han dog gøre det godt igen? Han må udrette noget virkeligt stort.
items.actors: Jan Linnebjerg, Jesper Klein, Paul Hüttel, Jeanne Boel, Christiane Bjørg Nielsen, Søren Østergaard, Birthe Neumann, Henning Jensen, Henrik Lykkegaard, Thomas Mørk

items.name: DK - Morten og Peter - er jeg da helt gak mor? (1991)
items.description: Tv-jounalisten Nick Horup skildrer gennem 20 år dagligdagen for de to mongoler Morten og Peter og Anna med ataksi. De har tanker og følelser som alle såkaldte normale, hvis begreber om livets lykke sættes i relief
items.actors: N/A

items.name: DK - Morten Og Peter - Er jeg stadig gak gak mor (1995)
items.description: N/A
items.actors: N/A

items.name: DK - Strømer (1976)
items.description: Kriminalbetjent Karl Jørgensen kommer på sporet af en større korruptionsaffære. Men det er sin sag for den temperamentsfulde politimand at trænge til bunds i korruptionen, der forgrener sig op i de højere samfundslag, hvor alle dækker over hinanden.
items.actors: Jens Okking, Otto Brandenburg, Birgit Sadolin, Preben Harris, Bendt Rothe, Henning Palner, Holger Juul Hansen, Dick Kaysø, Baard Owe, Peter Ronild

items.name: DK - Piger til søs (1977)
items.description: Denne gang er vore piger fra “Piger i Trøjen“, Ulla Jessen, Marianne Tønsberg og Helle Merete Sørensen udkommanderet til fjernkendingskursus på Holmen. Gaster fra minelæggeren “Falster“ inviterer pigerne på uofficielt besøg ombord. Uheldigvis bliver der alarmering og “Falster“ står til havs med tre blinde passagerer, der ikke er så glade for den ufrivillige tur - bl.a. efterlader Irmgard (Marianne Tønsberg) sit barn, der dog får sergent Vasby (Dirch Passer) som en ikke helt almindelig babysitter. Nyd Karl Stegger som chef og Henning Jensen som næstkommanderende.
items.actors: Dirch Passer, Helle Merete Sørensen, Marianne Tønsberg, Ulla Jessen, Karl Stegger, Henning Jensen, Ole Søltoft, Søren Strømberg, Lille Palle, Torben Jensen

items.name: DK - Piger i Trøjen (1975)
items.description: Flere og flere mænd synes at blive militærnægtere, mens flere og flere piger tiltrækkes af livet i “Dronningens klæ’r”. Det er blandt mange andre herlige piger Marianne (Birte Tove), der udelukkende har meldt sig for at glæde sin far og fordi hendes bror har valgt at blive militærnægter, Vibsen (Helle Merete Sørensen), en tidligere fiks fotomodel, og Magda (Ulla Jessen), der kommer lige fra mors hjemmebag. Oversergent Vasby (Dirch Passer) får lidt af et chok, da han opdager, at hans foresatte seniorsergent er en kvinde (Kirsten Walther), og det viser sig at 3. gruppe, som han skal overtage, alle er piger!
items.actors: Dirch Passer, Birte Tove, Helle Merete Sørensen, Marianne Tønsberg, Ulla Jessen, Karl Stegger, Paul Hagen, Per Pallesen, Kirsten Walther, Ole Monty

items.name: DK - Piger i trøjen 2 (1976)
items.description: Hermann arbejder i NATOs hovedkvarter i Bruxelles og er kun hjemme i weekenden. Han er ikke så lidt af en mandschauvinist. Derfor har hans kone Merete undladt at fortælle ham, at hun har gjort karriere i hæren - og er blevet løjtnant. I Meretes regiment mistænker seniorsergent Vasby hende for at være spion p.g.a. hendes "mystiske" samtaler til NATO. Det udvikler sig til en morsom spionjagt - og mange bliver indblandet. Da Hermann bliver genindkaldt, "glemmer" han at fortælle det til sin kone. Hvordan Meretes og Hermanns møde i trøjen foregår, og hvad enden på det hele bliver, må De hellere selv se!
items.actors: Dirch Passer, Berrit Kvorning, Helle Merete Sørensen, Marianne Tønsberg, Ulla Jessen, Karl Stegger, Klaus Pagh, Magi Stocking, Birger Jensen, Søren Strømberg

items.name: DK - Dyrlægens plejebørn (1968)
items.description: Winnie's mor skal til Bangkok for at klare et arvespørgsmål og søger en god børnepension. Hun ringer til doktor Linager, der fortæller, at han har en pension for "dyre børn", men prisen spiller ingen rolle for Winnies mor. Da Winnie dukker op, er den gode doktor Linager en anelse forbløffet. Han er nemlig dyrlæge og troede, at han skulle passe en siameserkat, men alle i huset tager selvfølgelig godt imod den lille, charmerende Winnie.
items.actors: Dirch Passer, Ove Sprogøe, Judy Gringer, Axel Strøbye, Lone Hertz, Winnie Mortensen, Karl Stegger, Susanne Bruun-Koppel, Folmer Rubæk, Lise Henningsen

items.name: DK - Soldaterkammerater rykker ud (1959)
items.description: Rekruttiden er overstået, og nu er soldaterkammeraterne rigtige "Basser". Oversergent Vældegård, er stadig den onde befalingsmand, men der er alligevel kommet en mildere tone i de buldrende kommandoråb, men det kan nu ikke tage pippet fra dem. Soldaterkammeraterne holder nemlig altid dampen oppe, selvom de skal lære disciplin, og udføre de givne ordre, kan der alligevel blive plads til humør.
items.actors: Louis Miehe-Renard, Ebbe Langberg, Paul Hagen, Preben Kaas, Klaus Pagh, Ole Dixon, Svend Johansen, Carl Ottosen, Bjørn Puggaard-Müller, Vera Stricker

items.name: DK - Soldaterkammerater på vagt (1960)
items.description: Under en øvelse kommer Knud væk fra sit kompagni. Heldigvis møder han 3 piger, som kører ham til kompagniet. Undervejs når han at forelske sig i den smukke franske pige, Nelle. I forvirringen glemmer han sit gevær i pigernes bil - og så er helvede løs for Knud. Men det daglige liv går videre - indtil en dag 7 af gutterne fra kasernen melder sig frivilligt til FN-styrkerne i Gaza. Her får de 7 spasmagere nok at se til - og til Knuds store glæde og forbavselse dukker Nelle op. Og denne gang har hun brug for Knuds hjælp…!
items.actors: Preben Kaas, Louis Miehe-Renard, Carl Ottosen, Klaus Pagh, Ole Dixon, Paul Hagen, Ebbe Langberg, Svend Johansen, Mogens Brandt, Vera Stricker

items.name: DK - Soldaterkammerater paa sjov (1962)
items.description: Ras, der er blevet løjtnant i Jægerkorpset, kommer en dag på besøg på sin gamle kaserne, hvor han møder alle sine tidligere rekrutkammerater. De er netop kommet hjem fra en øvelse, hvor de som sædvanlig har drillet oversergenten. De er nu på vej på orlov og foreslår Ras at tage med, men han afviser med den forklaring, at han skal planlægge en øvelse med Jægerkorpset. Han foreslår dem at melde sig til optagelsesprøve - men det har gutterne jo ikke lyst til. De er dog ikke i tvivl om, at de sagtens kunne klare det! På vej hjem fra orlov havner de i en forkert togvogn, som sætter dem af midt ude i en øde skov og pludselig er de omgivet af faldskærmstropper - og så er de sat på lidt af en prøve...
items.actors: Carl Ottosen, Ebbe Langberg, Louis Miehe-Renard, Paul Hagen, Preben Kaas, Klaus Pagh, Ole Dixon, Svend Johansen, Carl Carlsen, Mimi Heinrich

items.name: DK - Soldaterkammerater på efterårsmanøvre (1961)
items.description: De gamle kammerater genindkaldes til tre ugers efterårsmanøvre. De er ellers mest til øl, piger og munter musik, men oversergent Vældegaard skal nok få skrabet den civile rust af 'drengene'. Deres gamle venner fra rekrut-tiden er blevet i 'systemet' som henholdsvis delingsfører og sergent, men det lægger ikke en dæmper på løjerne. Skolelæreren får midt i kampens hede tid til at flirte med lotte-korps- kollegaen Birthe.
items.actors: Carl Ottosen, Ebbe Langberg, Louis Miehe-Renard, Preben Kaas, Paul Hagen, Klaus Pagh, Svend Johansen, Ole Dixon, Anne Werner Thomsen, Sigrid Horne-Rasmussen

items.name: DK - Soldaterkammerater på bjørnetjeneste (1968)
items.description: Til oversergent Vældegårds store fortrydelse hører menig 614 og menig 615 ikke til de mest almindelig soldater på kasernen. Og heldigvis, for der bliver god brug for deres uortodokse tilgang til livet i trøjen, da Obersten indgår et væddemål med en anden oberst om, hvem der har de bedste soldater. Et væddemål der skal afgøres under en øvelse, hvor en bjørn, nogle skønne kvinder og et cirkus bidrager til den almindelig forvirring.
items.actors: Preben Kaas, Paul Hagen, Willy Rathnov, Poul Bundgaard, Louis Miehe-Renard, Carl Ottosen, Dirch Passer, Nat Russell Jr., Karl Stegger, Anja Owe

items.name: DK - Soldaterkammerater (1958)
items.description: En håndfuld glade drenge fra hver deres hjørne af landet og hver deres baggrund indkaldes for at aftjene deres værnepligt: Den glade trompetist, bondedrengen, skolelæreren, charmetrolden, den tykke dreng og ham med styr på det hele. Dertil kommer det forkælede overklasseløg og vi har en gruppe, der trænger til at blive rettet af. Det sørger befalingshavende oversergent Vældegaard.
items.actors: Paul Hagen, Vera Stricker, Svend Johansen, Carl Ottosen, Louis Miehe-Renard, Ebbe Langberg, Preben Kaas, Ole Dixon, Henrik Wiehe, Klaus Pagh

items.name: DK - Skibet er ladet med (1960)
items.description: Skibet er ladet med fire vrede, unge mænd, en original skipper, en fotomodel, en radiostation, et piratflag og diverse musikinstrumenter. Og skibet ligger til ankers på internationalt farvand og kan hverken sejle frem eller tilbage. Til gengæld kan det udsende radioreklamer, og det gør det. Men hvis nogen af den grund skulle fristes til at tro, at filmens handling skulle være inspireret af det gode radio-reklameskib "Merkur", så er De helt på vildspor. Skibet i filmen hedder nemlig "Jupiter".
items.actors: Frits Helmuth, Mimi Heinrich, Kjeld Petersen, Jørgen Reenberg, Louis Miehe-Renard, Preben Lerdorff Rye, Jon Branner, Marianne Wesén, Gerda Madsen, Dirch Passer

items.name: DK - Julefrokosten (1976)
items.description: Julefrokosten er et festritual, der raser over det ganske land hvert år. Den er en sikkerhedsventil, et rensende bad, der giver kræfter og livslyst langt ind i det nye år. "Mennesker mødes" - og maskerne falder omkring de bugnende borde, hvor direktør og arbejder drikker dus. Nærdemokrati fungerer - og grundfæstede ægteskaber vakler! De færreste julefrokoster når dog op på samme højder som den, personalet på Simonsens Bijouteri Fabrik drikker sig op i.
items.actors: Jesper Langberg, Lisbet Dahl, Dick Kaysø, Preben Kaas, Jørgen Ryg, Judy Gringer, Kirsten Norholt, Poul Thomsen, Torben Jensen, Bjørn Puggaard-Müller

items.name: DK - Cirkeline og verdens mindste superhelt (2004)
items.description: Cirkeline er taget på ferie til Tyrkiet med sin tegner, så vennerne Ingolf, Frederik og Viktor sniger sig om bord på bedstefars skib for at komme ned og besøge hende. Her møder de en anden blind passager - den barske og frygtløse mus Ali, der er draget ud i verden for at gøre sin lykke. Vores venner lader sig lokke med på den nye mus’ spændende eventyr, men bedstefar bliver rasende, da han ikke vil have børn med om bord, og katten, kokken og kaptajnen er bestemt heller ikke museelskere. Det viser sig imidlertid også, at Ali bærer på en stor hemmelighed!
items.actors: Bodil Udsen, Jesper Klein, Ole Thestrup, Kaya Brüel, Bjarke Kastbjerg Andersen, Anna Gregorius

items.name: DK - Cirkeline - Ost og kærlighed (2000)
items.description: Hanne Hastrup har skabt Cirkeline og hendes univers. Hun har også tegnet det hele. Jannik Hastrup har animeret og produceret, og sammen har de skrevet alle historierne. Tegnefilmene blev produceret med støtte fra DR TV B&U afdelingen ved Mogens Vemmer fra 1968 til 1970.
items.actors: Ida Marie Christensen, Janne Britt Hansen, Niklas Ingemann, Anne Clausen, Joachim Boje Helvang, Jesper Klein, Claus Ryskjær, Otto Brandenburg, Tommy Kenter, Ditte Gråbøl

items.name: DK - Vildspor (1998)
items.description: Ossy, der bor i Thailand, opsøger sin barndomsven Jimmy i Island. Ossy bærer på en hemmelighed, og Jimmy er den eneste, som han kan fortælle den til. Men Jimmy vil ikke konfronteres med sin fortid, som han skjuler for sin kone, og smider Ossy ud. Ossy vil imidlertid først forsvinde, hvis Jimmy hjælper ham med en lille handel, så han har penge til flybilletten til Thailand.
items.actors: Nikolaj Coster-Waldau, Mads Mikkelsen, Nukâka Coster-Waldau, Pálína Jónsdóttir, Sævar Örn

items.name: DK - Viktor and Viktoria (1993)
items.description: Live action kiddie entertainment about two tribes of trolls fighting for control of a Magic Ring. The good witch Tikla meanwhile holds on to the Ring. Viktoria, an underground Troll child, is forbidden to visit the above-ground Trolls, but does so anyway. She meets Viktor and together they go through an array of dangers before they chance into Tikla's den. She gives them the Magic Ring so that they can mediate a truce between the tribes.
items.actors: Christian Potalivo, Amalie Ihle Alstrup, Lars Knutzon, Lene Brøndum, Barbara Topsøe-Rothenborg

items.name: DK - Watch Me Fly (1996)
items.description: A story about friendship and sticking together through tough times. The movie shows how two young girls and their families cope with their differences, how they are brought together and torn apart and how they are changed by the injury of a racing pigeon. But when the girls take it upon themselves to heal the pigeon, its recovery can bring them all hope.
items.actors: Stephanie Leon, Laura Christensen, Pernille Højmark, Stina Ekblad, Jesper Christensen

items.name: DK - My Granny's House (1984)
items.description: Danish author Soya's acidly funny turn-of-the-century memoir novel turned into a robust black comedy. After his mother's death, tiny tot Søren goes to live with his wilful, rich and stingy Granny, who wants to improve his manners. She also wants to make him sole heir to her fortune, which everybody else covets. Mutual respect, even love, develops between the two. And death by poison enlivens things.
items.actors: Mikkel Egelund, Bodil Udsen, Søren Spanning, Kirsten Olesen, Tammi Øst

items.name: DK - Naboerne (1966)
items.description: Tandlæge Gormsen og fabrikant Sandelund har købt sommerhus ved siden af hinanden i det idylliske landskab. Men det, der kunne have været afslapning og godt selskab, udvikler sig til et decideret fjendskab, og en veritabel nabokrig går i gang.
items.actors: Ebbe Rode, John Price, Hanne Borchsenius, Grethe Sønck, Jesper Langberg, Peter Steen, Pouel Kern, Henry Lohmann, Ingrid Langballe, Karl Stegger

items.name: DK - Miraklet i Valby (1989)
items.description: Fjortenårige Sven har en brændende interesse for amatørradio og har sit grej i en gammel campingvogn. En dag hører han mystiske og uforståelige stemmer i sin radio - og da han og vennerne Bo og Petra vil undersøge dem nærmere, bliver de sendt 700 år tilbage i tiden! Petra bliver kidnappet af riddere, og tilbage i nutiden bliver Sven og Bo afkrævet svar på hendes forsvinden. Men hvad skal de sige, og hvem vil tro på dem? De må tage tilbage til middelalderen for at befri Petra - og her oplever de Miraklet i Valby.
items.actors: Jakob Katz, Troels Asmussen, Lina Englund, Amalie Ihle Alstrup, Gregers Reimann, Ingvar Hirdwall, Mona Seilitz, Jens Okking, Karen-Lise Mynster, Peter Hesse Overgaard

items.name: DK - Ballerup Boulevard (1986)
items.description: Ungdomsfilm om en fjortenårig pige, hvis lykkelige liv slutter, da familiens økonomiske status ændres ved familiefirmaets krak og moderens fængselsophold på grund af kreativ bogføring. Pigen mister de fleste af sine kammerater, men genvinder livslysten, da hun sammen med en enkelt veninde danner et rock-band, som opnår stor succes ved en skolefest.
items.actors: Stine Bierlich, Anja Toft, Anja Kempinski, Morten Grunwald, Helle Hertz, Pelle Koppel, Allan Olsen, Otto Brandenburg, Edward Fleming, Mika Heilmann

items.name: DK - Mord i mørket (1986)
items.description: En fordrukken dagbladsjournalist fra Vesterbro jages både af politiet, som mistænker ham for mord, og af en narkoliga, der tror, han ved for meget om de nylige mord i det københavnske misbrugermiljø. Og hans redaktør er heller ikke tilfreds  dramaet udvikler sig spændingen stiger
items.actors: Michael Falch, Line Knutzon, Ove Sprogøe, Ole Ernst, Morten Grunwald

items.name: DK - Bølle Bob (1998)
items.description: Det er historien om den frække Bølle-Bob. (Han er grov men han er sjov). Endvidere den søde Lise-Mette, der i modsætning til Bølle-Bob, ikke kan finde ud af at være fræk. (Alligevel er hun ikke helt så sød, åbenbart). Børsterne spiller rigtig barske, og ser helst at alle er bange for dem. Smukke Sally kredser flittigt om Iversen, den lokale avis overhovede, fordi hun drømmer om at være fotomodel. Vi finder også den evigt forvirrende og fortravlede lærer Fru Basse, og den allestedsnærværende Hr. Blom, der går med drømme om en stor parkeringskælder til alle de folk der må besøge byen, når han gør den til et shopping paradis for turister.
items.actors: Anders Sund, Amalie Dollerup, Monica Bitsch, Liv Stevns Petersen, Sasia Mølgaard, Niels Ellegaard, Phillip Faber, Jan Linnebjerg, Paul Hagen, Birthe Neumann

items.name: DK - Støvsugerbanden (1963)
items.description: In the vicinity of Copenhagen, a group of pensioners live in a very large villa. The owner, Doctor Bach, has invited a colleague, the young master Peter Park , to visit him. They have a common interest that they could discuss during his stay. When he arrives, it is at a most inconvenient time. He is greeted by the doctor's sister, the almost deaf Camilla, who does not understand much of what is going on around her. The doctor has completely forgotten that he invited Park, but he settles him into the villa nonetheless. Here, Park meets the doctor's granddaughter, the young and beautiful Lise Bach (Henriette Normann), to whom he is immediately attracted. When Lise asks her grandfather if he is going out again, the doctor explains that he is going to the cinema with his good friend Friis.
items.actors: Henrik Bentzon, Clara Pontoppidan, Gunnar Lauring, Agnes Rehni, Henning Moritzen

items.name: DK - The Olsen Gang's Big Score (1972)
items.description: After his usual stay behind bars, Egon has another cunning plan involving millions. They rob over 4 million from a money transport. The gang keeps a low profile and hide the money. But it's stolen by "Kongen" and "Knægten", who immediately start living it up - in the penthouse suite at the Sheraton. The suitcase with the money changes hands several times, before Kongen's daughter takes of with all the money.
items.director: Erik Balling, Tom Hedegaard, Birthe Frost
items.actors: Ove Sprogøe, Morten Grunwald, Poul Bundgaard, Kirsten Walther, Arthur Jensen

items.name: DK - The Olsen Gang's Last Trick (1998)
items.description: Egon escapes from the psychiatric ward, where he has been incarcerated since the gang's last coup. Keld and Benny pick him up, and when Egon, as always, is planning the big heist, the Olsen Gang is once again on the move.
items.director: Morten Arnfred, Tom Hedegaard, Birthe Frost, Linda Daae
items.actors: Ove Sprogøe, Morten Grunwald, Poul Bundgaard, Bjørn Watt-Boolsen, Henrik Koefoed

items.name: DK - The Last Exploits of the Olsen Gang (1974)
items.description: The Olsen Gang has finally made it. They are in Mallorca, having fulfilled their dream. Almost, that is. They don't have any money, so Egon has to open a safe at a restaurant to get some. As usual, however, Egon ends up in prision. When they return to Denmark, he has a new plan.
items.director: Erik Balling, Tom Hedegaard, Birthe Frost
items.actors: Ove Sprogøe, Morten Grunwald, Poul Bundgaard, Kirsten Walther, Axel Strøbye

items.name: DK - The Olsen Gang Jumps the Fence (1981)
items.description: As usual, Egon has an ingenious plan. And, as usual, it works just fine until one of the gang members makes some kind of funny error. This time, however, even Egon's life is in danger, for some international criminals try to get rid of him by throwing him into a container filled with acid.
items.director: Erik Balling, Tom Hedegaard, Birthe Frost
items.actors: Ove Sprogøe, Morten Grunwald, Poul Bundgaard, Kirsten Walther, Axel Strøbye

items.name: DK - The Olsen Gang Sees Red (1976)
items.description: Egon and the gang are hired to stage a robbery of an antique Chinese vase for an economically challenged baron. Naturally they fooled, which infuriates Egon. The gang tries to get back at the baron by switching the vase with a cheap Hong Kong copy. One attempt is made during the barons hunting party, where Egon ends up being bricked up in the catacombs. In another attempt, the gang has to coordinate breaking through several walls at The Royal Theater in Copenhagen with the "Elverhøj" overture.
items.actors: Ove Sprogøe, Morten Grunwald, Poul Bundgaard, Kirsten Walther, Jes Holtsø

items.name: DK - The Olsen Gang on the Track (1975)
items.description: Egon and his two cronies managed to sneak a fortune with them to Spain. Here they live a life in a whirl of pleasures, but they are not truly happy. While Egon always has the money chained to him, Bøffen still manages to steal them. Egon ends up in jail once again, and when he comes out, he has a brilliant plan.
items.director: Erik Balling, Birthe Frost, Claus Ørsted, Tom Hedegaard, Finn Karlsson
items.actors: Ove Sprogøe, Morten Grunwald, Poul Bundgaard, Kirsten Walther, Jes Holtsø

items.name: DK - The Olsen Gang Never Surrenders (1979)
items.description: Egon plans to exploit knowledge gained during his latest term of incarceration. By stealing the unmanipulated financial records of DanInvest he obtains the majority of the stocks in the department store Magasin du Nord, just in time for their closing sale. The attempt to get the red suitcase that will save the day they rob the main vault at the EEC headquarters in Brussels and end up hijacking a tank.
items.director: Erik Balling, Birthe Frost, Henning Sprogøe, Tom Hedegaard
items.actors: Ove Sprogøe, Morten Grunwald, Poul Bundgaard, Kirsten Walther, Axel Strøbye

items.name: DK - The Olsen Gang in Jutland (1971)
items.description: The Olsen gang in Jutland. Ones again Egon Olsen has a plan when he gets out of Vridslose State Prison. He has found out that the Germans left a large sum of money (in American dollars and gold bars) in one of their commando bunkers, when they were defeated in 1945; the only problem it's in Jutland. Egon, Benny and Kjeld "appropriate" a car and drives to Jutland along with Kjelds wife and child Yvonne and Borge. They look forward to fooling the the people in Jutland, but of course, things don't go quite as planed. It ends with Benny, Kjeld, Borge and Yvonne sitting in the train back to Copenhagen, were they are overtaken by Egon in his car on the road next to the track. This is the last time the Olsen gang goes to Jutland.
items.director: Erik Balling, Hans Kristensen, Birthe Frost, Annette Skjoldager
items.actors: Ove Sprogøe, Morten Grunwald, Poul Bundgaard, Kirsten Walther, Helle Virkner

items.name: DK - Olsen-banden (1968)
items.description: Første film i succes-serien med Egon, Benny og Kjeld serverer den herlige, velmiksede cocktail af store planer og mindre, men afgørende, katastrofer. Egon lander i Vridsløse, fordi Benny og Kjeld klodser i det under et tyveriforsøg, men han kommer ud med en plan. Et kostbart tysk kunst-klenodie er udstillet i København?
items.actors: Ove Sprogøe, Morten Grunwald, Poul Bundgaard, Peter Steen, Poul Reichhardt

items.name: DK - I Jomfruens tegn (1973)
items.description: N/A
items.actors: Sigrid Horne-Rasmussen, Ole Søltoft, Anne Bie Warburg

items.name: DK - Unge piger forsvinder i København (1951)
items.description: N/A

items.name: DK - Wolf Hour (1981)
items.description: The adaptation of Helle Stangerup's psychological horror, telling the story of a married couple who raises wolfes, in order for the husband to study the creatures. They hire Ellinor for additional help, but soon they wonder if she guards supernatural secrets.
items.actors: Frits Helmuth, Ghita Nørby, Jannie Faurschou, Henning Rohde

items.name: DK - Tre små piger (1966)
items.description: Grev Rambow har mistet sin formue og må nu bo til leje sammen med sine tre døtre, Beate, Marie og Annette. Grevens eneste håb er, at døtrene gifter sig tilbage til fordums rigdom. Så da tre bejlere melder sig, bliver de nøje målt og vejet. Alt går som planlagt, indtil den rige Hertuginde de Groos vil have sit skvat af en søn gift med Beate. Den desperate greve slår straks til. Men Beate er forelsket i en anden, og nu må pigerne stå sammen, så de alle kan få den, de elsker. Det er en sand stjernebesætning, der stiller op til den sang-, sjov- solfyldte ”Tre Små Piger” - baseret på Walter Kollos operette fra 1927. Instruktør Ebbe Langberg har æren af at instruere Poul Bundgaard, Susse Wold, Malene Schwartz, Daimi, Ove Sprogøe, Bodil Udsen, Karl Stegger og ikke mindst sin 26-årige lillebror, Jesper Langberg i en film, der er lige dele underholdende lystspil og imponerende flot udstyrsstykke. Stærke kræfter bag en musikalsk storfilm - på DVD i Nordisk Films 100-års jubilæumsår.
items.actors: Poul Bundgaard, Susse Wold, Daimi, Ove Sprogøe, Bodil Udsen, Karl Stegger, Paul Hagen, Maria Garland, Birger Jensen, Jørgen Kiil

items.name: DK - To (1964)
items.description: In this romantic drama, Niels (Jens Osterholm) is a petty thief and irresponsible lout who meets Lone (Yvonne Ingdal), a hospital lab assistant who is just the opposite of Niels. The two meet, fall in love, and must learn the old adage that opposites attract. The unenviable Niels and the model citizen Lone are helpless to fight their passionate chemistry when they are together.
items.actors: Yvonne Ingdal, Jens Østerholm, Jørgen Bidstrup, Birgit Brüel, Christian Glatved, Kjeld Jacobsen, Peter Steen, Lis Adelvard

items.name: DK - Sunes Family (1997)
items.description: It's vacation time, but the Andersen family can't figure out where to go. Reaching agreement is not exactly the easiest for the family. Everyone has his own plans how he would like to spend the holidays. Now it's just that Sune is also hot-burned at newly-relocated neighbor Sophie (Stephanie León), so he doesn't have it easy. While trying to impress her, he is chased by a vicious motorcycle thug and is constantly on the run.
items.actors: Claus Bue, Vibeke Hastrup, Sofie Lassen-Kahlke, Per Damgård Hansen, Rasmus Albeck, Julie Nielsdotter Andresen, Niels Anders Thorn, Inge Sofie Skovbo, Sara Møller Olsen, Erni Arneson

items.name: DK - A Sailor goes ashore (1954)
items.description: Frederik Larsen (Lau Lauritzen Jr.), a sailor and has sailed since he was 15. Now he has lost the desire for a sailor life, especially after his best friend Bob was lost in a hurricane. When his ship docks at Copenhagen, shortly before Christmas, he signs off with all his hire on the pocket. He seeks accommodations in sailor home Bertel, located on the nice side of Nyhavn. Here he can stay and eat for very little money. He delivers his kitbag to the concierge Henrik (Mogens Hermansen) before he was lured by accordion music and the laughter that comes to him from the "naughty" side of Nyhavn. In the Cafe "The black sails", he accidently joins Inger (Lisbeth Movin) at the same table, whose profession is not in the phone book, although it is the world's oldest. Inger is in the company of an unemployed stoker Vladimir W. Olsen (Poul Reichhardt) that is full of scams, and has a good mood.

items.name: DK - Zappa (1983)
items.description: Denmark, 1961. Bjørn, a middle-class boy in his early teens, wants to be accepted by Steen, a bullying peer of his with wealthy but freezingly cold parents. Bjørn's other good friend is Mulle, a cheerful and more childish working-class boy. All three seem friends at first, but gradually Steen starts pushing Mulle away while pulling the impressionable Bjørn with him towards more and more violence.

items.description: Walter's a handsome airline steward who catches the eye of Inge, winner of Malaga's Miss Moonlight contest. Carlo is a motor-mouthed goof who has a "heel bar" (a combination shoe shop and tavern); his companion, Elly, is shooting a video of him. Inge discovers she's an unwitting smuggler, bringing diamonds into Denmark in the heel of a sandal she's won at the beauty contest.

items.name: DK - Day of Wrath (1943)
items.description: In a Danish village in the early 1600s, a young woman named Anne, whose mother was thought to be a witch, develops sympathy toward an old woman, Marte, who is accused of witchcraft. The intervention of Anne's older but kindly husband, Pastor Absalon saved her mother -- but now, urged on by his overbearing mother, he refuses to help Marte. When Absalon's son returns home and is attracted to Anne, it's a matter of time before her family destiny catches up with her.

Based on the best-selling Danish novel by Dea Trie Moerch and directed by acclaimed Danish filmmaker Astrid Henning-Jensen, "Winterborn" was considered one of the best movies of the decade in Denmark.

Viktoria, an underground Troll child, is forbidden to visit the above-ground Trolls, but does so anyway. She meets Viktor and together they go through an array of dangers before they chance into Tikla's den. She gives them the Magic Ring so that they can mediate a truce between the tribes.

When Jytte, her friend, a salesgirl who is the mistress of a married man, tells her she is pregnant, Else thinks she has worked things out: along with her husband she will adopt the unwanted child. When he is stopped by the police and tells them about the elephant they think he is crazy. He is committed to an asylum by the very authorities his taxes are funding. The doctor tries to convince him that the elephants were not really there, but he gets more help from manic fellow patient Knudsen who makes him realize that everybody in the world is crazy in some way.

items.name: DK - Twist and Shout (1984)
items.description: Danish teens come of age in 1963. Bjorn and Erik are close friends. Bjorn is pursued by Kirsten, a future Stepford wife, but he falls for Anna, who initiates him into love and sex. Erik is somber, caring for his home-bound mentally-ill mother while his strict father rules his life. He desires Kirsten, but she's unattainable. Pregnancy, a horrific abortion, an engagement party, and a revelation about the rectitude of Erik's father lead to a climax: Bjorn and Erik must stand up to controlling adults.

It turns out they are sisters, and will inherit from their late mother, if the can stay together one month in the same house. items.description: Ordinary Jan has no easy life. He is by far the most unpopular employee at work. At home it's even worse. His marriage with the not so ordinary Bente is on the verge of a breakdown. Jan's boss finally sends him into group therapy where an unlikely friendship emerges between Jan and the two mechanics Rudy and Alf.

Rabbit suggests that Tigger go find others of his kind to bounce with, but Tigger thinks "the most wonderful thing about tiggers is" he's "the only one!" Just in case though, the joyously jouncy feline sets out to see if he can find relatives.

items.description: With his first Dogma-95 film director Lars von Trier opens up a completely new film platform. With a mix of home-video and documentary styles the film tells the story of a group of young people who have decided to get to know their “inner-idiots” and thus not only facing and breaking their outer appearance but also their inner.

items.name: DK - The Son from Vingaarden (1975)
items.description: Vingården står foran nedrivning. Det er nu 30 år siden onkel Olsen døde og gården må efter 30 år sælges, hvis ingen i familien Martin ønsker at købe den. Da der ankommer en dansk-amerikaner til den lille by, sætter Jacobsen Nicoline til at undersøge den fremmedes værelse. Erik Hein, født Martin, forsøger at købe Vingården men forhindres. I stedet køber han Sophienberg. Eriks far har for mange år siden skrevet under på en tilståelse om underslæb mod Vingården. Erik tror på sin fars uskyld og får hjælp til at bevise farens uskyld af nogle af byens retskafne beboere.
items.actors: Ib Mossin, Kirsten Rolffes, Ellen Winther Lembourn, Arthur Jensen, Poul Bundgaard, Claus Nissen, Susanne Jagd, Peer Guldbrandsen, Baard Owe, Edward Fleming

items.name: DK - Sønnen fra Amerika (1957)
items.description: Niels Pind er en drukkenbolt der bliver udnyttet af nogle af byens beboere. Dette får en ende, da hans søn, Jens kommer tilbage fra Amerika med en masse penge. Jens køber det lokale gods og begynder at udvinde grus fra jorden. Han får hurtigt et dårligt omdømme i området fordi han kun tænker på penge. Niels Pind slår hånden af sin søn. Jens ændres dog, efterhånden som han bliver mere og mere forelsket i Ingrid.
items.actors: Peter Malberg, Poul Reichhardt, Emil Hass Christensen, Lisbeth Movin, Kjeld Petersen, Holger Juul Hansen, Anna Hagen, Preben Kaas, Louis Miehe-Renard, Knud Heglund

Samtidig bliver der smuglet til byen; billig sprut er i omløb. Sus forsøger sammen med sin ven Stille at opklare forbrydelsen.

items.name: DK - Copper (1976)
items.description: Efter et sanatorieophold pga. voldelig opførsel under en arrestation, bliver kriminalassistent Karl Jørgensen overført til bedrageriafdelingen. Her opdager Karl en sag, hvor hans ekskone og hendes nye mand er indblandet. Da Karl begynder at undersøge sagen, bliver han stoppet af politimesteren. Karl slår sig sammen med journalisten John Bullnes. De kommer efterhånden tættere på sandheden, men stoppes da en mistænkt begår selvmord. Karl bliver suspenderet og Bullnes sendes til Berlin på en opgave. Karl tager herefter sagen i egen hånd og anholder byens borgmester og en stor entreprenør. © Copyright 1997-2012, Lone Hansen & Per Kjær Fredborg
items.actors: Jens Okking, Otto Brandenburg, Birgit Sadolin, Preben Harris, Bendt Rothe, Henning Palner, Holger Juul Hansen, Dick Kaysø, Baard Owe, Peter Ronild

items.name: DK - Dreaming of Paradise (1987)
items.description: Strit and her friends live in the future where the Earth has become so polluted that they must live underground. As legend has it, a creature that “Walks on Air” will guide them to a place where there are blue skies and green meadows.Set in a world so ravaged by pollution that the humans have been forced underground, this distinguished animated cautionary tale warns of the consequences of our current disregard for the environment as it tells the story of a young girl and her friends who set off on an exciting quest for the pristine, natural paradise of their dreams.
items.actors: Anne Marie Helger, Jess Ingerslev, Tommy Kenter, Per Pallesen, Kirsten Peüliche, Louis Miehe-Renard, Claus Ryskjær, Berthe Qvistgaard

items.description: Liv Ulmann's directorial debut also had her co-authoring the screenplay (with poet Peter Poulsen) as based on a Henri Nathansen's 1932 novel about an affluent late 19th century Jewish merchant family in Copenhagen. Ulmann focuses on strong-willed daughter Sofie's progress through life: a love affair with a gentile painter, an arranged marriage , childbirth and ever more fateful challenges.

items.name: DK - Strike First Freddy (1965)
items.description: Frede Hansen, a game salesman, is mistaken for a secret service agent on a ferry and kidnapped by enemy agents. He escapes and now the secret service want to use him as bait to track the enemy. They assign their best agent, Smith to be his partner and supervisor. Their main task is to eliminate the head of the enemy conspiracy, the mysterious 'Dr. Pax' who's real identity is unknown. Freddy accompanies Smith to Stockholm where they are to meet Sonja, an agent for Dr. Pax, who is also on Smith's liquidation list. Thanks to his bag of game tricks, Freddy manages to avoid being done in by Kolick, a killer for Dr. Pax. Freddy falls for Sonja, and he, she and Smith are taken as prisoners to Dr. Pax's hideout, a remote island fortress from which a major power is to be attacked by missiles guided by trained pigeons. Freddy manages to teach Dr. Pax a lasting lesson in the difference between trained pigeons and homing pigeons.
items.actors: Morten Grunwald, Ove Sprogøe, Essy Persson, Poul Bundgaard, John Wittig, Frankie Steele, Jørgen Blaksted, Edward Fleming, Valsø Holm, Lisbeth Frandsen

items.name: DK - Stepping Out (1981)
items.description: Individually divorced and disillusioned, Jens and Karen meet and are drawn towards each other, but how does one go about courtship in a natural way, let alone a tangible relationship, in a time and age of general wisdom on every bookshelf? Surrounded by marital misfits and ex-partners, Jens and Karen give love a half-chance nonetheless.
items.actors: Solbjørg Højfeldt, Ole Ernst, Claus Nissen, Ulf Pilgaard, Lisbet Lundquist, Ove Sprogøe, Line Brøndum, Puk Schaufuss, Merete Hegner, Alice Thorlacius

items.name: DK - Relax Freddy (1966)
items.description: A Chinese diplomat is kidnapped from a conference in Genève and the world peace is at risk. The trail leads to a hiding place in Denmark and the Danish secret service brings in their best agent, agent Smith, who has been in a psychiatric hospital since his last assignment. To accompany Smith they once again turn to novelty and party tricks salesman Frede Hansen, because they need an unrecognizable man to infiltrate the crime syndicate behind the kidnapping.
items.actors: Morten Grunwald, Ove Sprogøe, Hanne Borchsenius, Dirch Passer, Clara Pontoppidan, Asbjørn Andersen, Erik Mørk, Kristopher Kum, Freddy Koch, Carl Ottosen

items.name: DK - Emma's Shadow (1988)
items.description: Emma (Line Kruse) is an eleven year-old only child from a wealthy Danish family. Emma's parents seem more interested in their own interests than in her. One evening when Emma overhears her mother talking about how tragic it must be to have your child kidnapped, Emma decides to stage her own kidnapping. She soon meets Malthe, a kind-hearted, child-like, naïve sewer cleaner who literally stumbles on to her. She convinces Malthe that she is a Russian princess whose family is being chased by Bolsheviks, so Malthe lets Emma stay with him in his very modest abode. After being "kidnapped" for a few days, Emma decides to return home. But, just as she is about to return, she overhears a couple of servants talking about how her parents don't seem to be very upset over her dilemma....
items.actors: Line Kruse, Börje Ahlstedt, Henrik Larsen, Inge Sofie Skovbo, Bent N. Steinert, Ken Vedsegaard, Ulla Henningsen, Otto Brandenburg, Sanne Grangaard, Lene Vasegaard

He believes in the principle that readers must have what they like,and he therefore notes with satisfaction that there has been a new large jewel theft, the fifth in the last 14 days. It is apparently an unusually cunning gang and the police are powerless. Between the numerous newspaper delivery is the little newspaper girl Suzanne, called Sus, and she manage a small newsstand in Adelgade.

items.description: Old rockers, like soldiers, never die, they only pass away. Well, Erik Clausen turns nostalgia into a vivid tribute to the moods and manners of the 1950s Danish Rock'n Roll by picking up a group of dispersed fellow bandsmen from wherever life and fate have left them stranded to have them revive their group and relive the good old days. A spirit of social solidarity permeates throughout.

items.name: DK - Qivitoq (1956)
items.description: A young teacher, Eva Nygaard, arrives in Greenland from Denmark to surprise her fiance, the Doctor Erik Halsøe, but is crushed to find he has not waited for her and he is about to be married to his assisting nurse. Eva travels to a small fishing village to await the next ship back to Denmark. There she enters into a tense and often confrontational relationship with Jens, a quiet moody Dane who manages a trading company outpost. Meanwhile, Jens is trying to persuade a Greenlander named Pavia to become a company fisherman, despite Pavia's fear of alienating his fellow villagers and upsetting the spirit, Qivitoq.

items.name: DK - Portland (1996)
items.description: The basic story of a young criminal not quite living up to his won ideals of "not to give a damn" sidesteps out of his criminal career while dragging his younger brother into it, could have been interesting. Unfortunately the implementation is simply not good enough. As so often with Danish movies, there is little appreciation for detail thus leaving us with hoodlums talking like they've done time at a business academy rather than a prison. Dialects completely out of here and idiosyncratic bikers without bikes or even character for that matter. An ever accelerating surrealism towards the end doesn't help to clear the slow pace of this film but it does give a glimpse of what the story could have unfolded to become.
items.actors: Anders W. Berthelsen, Ulrich Thomsen, Iben Hjejle, Helle Dolleris, Jens Albinus, Birthe Neumann

The villagers are distrustful towards the newcomers. After a while the baker, the butcher and the grocer won't give Poeten and Lillemor credit anymore. Also the old creditor is back dogging them. Should Poeten renounce his high poetical standards and write simple verses for popular music, to get money?

items.name: DK - Pas paa svinget i Solby (1940)
items.description: Præsten i Solby låner 2.000 kr. i menighedsrådskassen for at betale for et af sine sognebørns hospitalsophold i Tyskland. Rigmandsdatteren Marianne skal være brudepige i Aalborg og tager fra København mod Jylland. I Solby kører hun for stærkt gennem byen, hvorfor hun kommer ud for et biluheld og lander i præstens have! Hun begynder straks at dirigere rundt med alle i præstegården, hvilket tante Marie bestemt ikke er glad for. Præsten er derimod tiltrukket af pigen. De bader i søen og går til bal sammen, hvilket medfører at fru Larsen tager ind for at tale med biskoppen. Efter at Marianne er taget tilbage til København melder Biskoppen sin ankomst i sognegården. Hvor skal præsten nu finde de 2.000 kr. ? Præsten har dog en del venner der forsøger at hjælpe ham, men han får også uventet hjælp af biskoppen.

He is not just some old-fashioned strongbox thief that can't remember like Egon, but a young hip IT criminal, that thinks that everyone else is inferior. However, Egon doesn't take lightly to the Georg's patronizing so he sabotages Georg's computer and ruins his cup. This time Egon's ambitions reaches a new high, when he and his gang break in to the World Bank, and they get away with it. Of course, thanks to Yvonne, they aren't rich very long.

His knowledge is at the very theoretical level, and he will be seriously trouble when he for a time has to babysit his sister's six children ranging in age from baby to teenager. Fortunately, the neighbor cute daughter, Lisbeth has a more practical take on things.

items.name: DK - Wife on vacation (1967)
items.description: Allan Thorsen er træt af sin kone, men han har svært ved at få sagt at han vil skilles. Derfor arrangerer han en skiferie, hvor hun skal blive forelsket i en anden mand, således at han kan slippe af med hende uden at han selv skal gøre noget. Hun finder da også en mand der er interesseret, men så bliver Allan jaloux og snart forsøger Allan at vinde sin kone tilbage. Sagen kompliceret dog af, at Allan elskerinde pludselig møder op på feriehotellet.

On her birthday she gets sent an ancient, magical figure from her uncle in South America. On the same day Pusle's parents has to travel to London, and the large family is now left to strict aunt Alma.

items.name: DK - Six Kids and the Honeymooners (1967)
items.description: Erik and Lisbeth are getting married and then honeymoon to Austria. When Mom and Dad need to have another baby, the four small decides to go on the honeymoon as well. They hide in the caravan and come unseen to Austria. Since they do not have passports, Erik can not just send them home. The children are only listed in their mother's passport and she is in the hospital giving birth. Lisbeth and Erik have to take care of the kids. It provides a lot of fun entanglements between the wedding couple and the children. Erik and Lisbeth doing now what they can just get a few moments alone. However, there is always something, so it will be an unforgettable honeymoon with my sister's children.

items.name: DK - Carl - My Childhood Symphony (1994)
items.description: Combining the exultant sweep of epic period drama with the subtle intimacy of biography in a social perspective, this is a tale of materially impoverished childhood, struggling early manhood and an unrequited first love turned into good musical fortune for Carl Nielsen, one of the great composers of the 20th century. Based on the composer's autobiography, the film itself is designed to soar like a symphony.

items.name: DK - My Granny's House (1984)
items.description: Danish author Soya's acidly funny turn-of-the-century memoir novel turned into a robust black comedy. After his mother's death, tiny tot Søren goes to live with his wilful, rich and stingy Granny, who wants to improve his manners. She also wants to make him sole heir to her fortune, which everybody else covets. Mutual respect, even love, develops between the two. And death by poison enlivens things.

But when the death of his own father takes him back to his poverty-stricken childhood home, far out in the country, his career plans fall apart. For one thing he has to deal with his loveable, backward brother, who is now all alone; for another, he meets a stunning woman who comes to the farm as a housekeeper, in disguise of her real profession as a call-girl.

items.name: DK - Masser af Passer (1955)
items.description: Dirch Passer gør det igen. Idenne utrolig morsomme Passer film møder vi Dirch som medlem af grundpersonalet hos SAS. Dirch har den lille fejl, at han er håbløst forelsket i en stewardesse (Agneta) og under sit arbejde, har han meget svært ved ikke at drømme om sin forelskelse. Gang på gang drømmer han sig ind i forskellige helteroller for på den måde at tiltrække sig opmærksomheden fra hans øjesten, Agneta. Vi møder Dirch som flykaptajn, arkæolog, gangster, sømand, prins, forsvarsadvokat, boksemester og soldat i det vilde vesten. Alt dette er roller som han lever sig ind i ved sine drømmerier. Men når man drømmer vågner man jo som regel igen, og det gør Peter (Dirch Passer) også, og hver gang finder han sig selv i de mest pinlige situationer. Spørgsmålet er om det nogensinde skal lykkes for Peter at få sin Agneta til at se til hans side, og vil hun overhovedet lægge mærke til at han drømmer om hende, og vil han kunne beholde sit job hos SAS? Alt dette og meget mere besvares i humør
items.actors: Dirch Passer, Åke Grönberg, Iréne Söderblom, Ib Schønberg

items.description: Johannes Vig lever et ensomt liv på Sandø. Han er skolelærer og da Sandø i øjeblikket er afskåret fra omverden pga. is må øens befolkning klare sig selv. Johannes er hemmeligt forelsket i både Annemari, købmandens unge datter og i gårdmandskonen Rigmor. Samtidig er Johannes liv meget trøstesløs og det er svært for ham at give sin kærlighed udtryk. Øens liv forstyrres af Harry, en ung ingeniør der gør kur til Annemari. Annemaris kæreste er i øjeblikket på fastlandet, hvorfor det er Johannes der våger over hendes dyd. © Copyright 1997-2012, Lone Hansen & Per Kjær Fredborg

Det er ellers kvalifikationer, som både chefen og en konkurrerende kollega finder helt nødvendige. Lund lader derfor som om, han har været gift længe. Den lille nødløgn får imidlertid uoverskuelige konsekvenser, da chefen inviterer Lund og frue til middag. Lund må på jagt efter en kone til låns og så griber forviklingerne om sig i et rasende tempo.

items.name: DK - Lykkens musikanter (1962)

Det er et fristed, hvor husets beboer får lov til at være anderledes, at være sig selv i en fremmedgjort verden. Lydia Wiljengren (Ellen Gottschalch), der er enke efter en rig musikhandler, ejer "Villa Orfeus". Hun har efterhånden sat hele sin formue overstyr ved sin forkærlighed for musikalske mennesker. Den eneste betingelse for at bo i huset er, at de enten kan spille eller synge.

items.name: SE - Your Fault: London
items.description: Nick och Noah står båda inför livsförändrande utmaningar som hotar att dra dem åt olika håll. Nick inleder ett samarbete med sin far, medan Noah påbörjar ett nytt kapitel vid Oxford University. När de lever separata liv och möter nya människor ställs deras relation inför frestelser, rivaliteter och svek som prövar deras band mer än någonsin tidigare. I takt med att hemligheter avslöjas och spänningarna växer måste de kämpa för att hålla fast vid varandra, eller riskera att förlora allt.
items.actors: Asha Banks, Matthew Broome, Louisa Binder, Joel Nankervis, Scarlett Rayner, Orlando Norman, Ray Fearon, Enva Lewis, Eve Macklin, Nicole Ansari-Cox

items.actors: Roland Vouilloz, George Lenz, Juan Manuel Barrera, Jenette Goldstein, Casey Killoran, Augusta Thoenig, Jan Zawisza, Leonor Oberson, Einat Holland

items.name: SE - Still Sexy (Ancora più sexy)
items.description: Maddalena har allt: ett jobb hon älskar, den perfekta fästmannen och ett drömbröllop framför sig. Ändå känns något fel i sovrummet. Uppmanad av sin inre röst, förkroppsligad av porrstjärnan Valentina Nappi, börjar hon ifrågasätta sitt liv. Mötet med Bruno, en trädgårdsmästare med ett oroligt förflutet, får henne att återupptäcka sig själv och inse att den enda vägen som är värd att följa är hennes egen.
items.actors: Diana Del Bufalo, Valentina Nappi, Mario Ermito, Michele Rosiello, Filippo Bisciglia, Angela Finocchiaro, Anna Galiena, Fabrizio Colica, Ludovica Di Donato, Andrea Dianetti

items.name: SE - Husbands in Action
items.description: En polis samarbetar med sin ex-frus nya make för att hitta de som kidnappat henne. Kan de lägga sina meningsskiljaktigheter åt sidan under ett vilt fritagningsförsök?
items.actors: Jin Sun-kyu, Gong Myoung, Kim Ji-seok, Yoon Kyung-ho, Kang Han-na, Lee Da-hee, Jeon So-min, Yoona, Oh Eun-seo, Lee Hyun-gul

items.name: SE - How to Make a Killing
items.description: Vad gör man om man är fattig men skulle kunna lägga vantarna på en avsevärd familjeförmögenhet, om bara en rad släktingar undanröjdes? Becket Redfellow tänker inte låta något - eller någon - komma i vägen för de pengar som han tycker att han förtjänar.
items.actors: Glen Powell, Margaret Qualley, Jessica Henwick, Bill Camp, Zach Woods, Topher Grace, Ed Harris, Raff Law, Nell Williams, Alexander Hanson

items.name: SE - Colors of Evil: Black (Kolory zła: Czerń)
items.description: När en pojke försvinner i en sömnig småstad hittar en nyligen omplacerad åklagare oväntade kopplingar till ett tidigare försvinnande.
items.actors: Jakub Gierszał, Marianna Zydek, Andrzej Chyra, Beata Ścibakówna, Adam Bobik, Robert Gonera, Piotr Żurawski, Jan Sałasiński, Julian Świeżewski, Jacek Bąk

items.name: SE - Night Shoot
items.description: Ett dokumentärprojekt går snett när en grupp filmstudenter snubblar över ett märkligt samhälle för hemlösa i skogen och de börjar inse att de är iakttagna...
items.actors: Derek Evans, Darrell Snedeger, Eddie Davenport, Johnny Land, D.B. Lambert, Truly Magyar, David Tiefen, Alexia Bailey, Jason Francisco Blue, Kasey O'Barr

items.name: SE - Highest 2 Lowest
items.description: När en mäktig musikmogul blir utsatt för en komplott involverande en lösensumma, tvingas han kämpa för sin familj och sitt eftermäle samtidigt som han är insyltad i ett dödligt moraliskt dilemma.
items.actors: Denzel Washington, Jeffrey Wright, Ilfenesh Hadera, Elijah Wright, Aubrey Joseph, A$AP Rocky, John Douglas Thompson, LaChanze, Dean Winters, Wendell Pierce

items.name: SE - EPiC: Elvis Presley in Concert
items.description: Elvis Presley som du aldrig har sett honom tidigare. Innehåller sedan länge förlorat filmmaterial som har hittats av Oscar-nominerade Baz Luhrmann.
